📋 v2.0.0 Release Notes ▾
v2.0.0Multi-department upgrade: isolated data per dept, manager multi-dept access, developer-managed depts & feature flags, per-dept ratios, approval toggle, leader parts access control.
v1.3.0SDT division fixed: Technician/Under Supervision shares based on configurable ratios, no duplicate overwrite, equal sharing within each role.
v1.1.0Under-Supervision auto 75% allocation · Date range pickers · Leader Tech Entry page · Duplicate overwrite · Entry form cleanup.
v1.0.0Initial release — Firebase backend, technician/leader/developer roles, monthly KPI targets.
Developed by NATNAEL N.

🗂
Grouped by Task Code. Hours divided by same-role peers. Technicians see all groups they participate in, plus all colleagues on those same task codes.
⚖️
Tech% + Under Supervision% must = 100%. Inspector and Preliminary Inspector use fixed hours — completely separate from SDT. If no supervision is recorded for a task, the technician gets 100% of SDT.
🗑 Scrap Operation — Inspector Default Hours
Default Inspector Hours for Scrap Operations
When a technician selects Scrap job type, the inspector hours field defaults to this value. You can override per-entry on the entry form.
